description_long: This is a classic red Radio Flyer-style trolley with a rectangular metal body and four black-and-white wheels. The trolley features a deep, open-top platform suitable for carrying small loads or children, with slightly raised sides for containment. A long, black handle is attached to the front, designed for pulling and steering, and it has a hexagonal grip for comfortable handling. The wheels are robust and slightly inset under the body, providing stability and smooth rolling on urban surfaces. The side of the trolley displays the 'radio flyer' branding in white text, along with the number '7'. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a glossy red finish and metallic components.
description: A red metal Radio Flyer-style trolley with four wheels, a long black pull handle, and white branding on the side. It has a deep open platform and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red rectangular body, four wheels, and the black handle angled forward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the trolley, the handle's hexagonal grip, and the two front wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible 'radio flyer' branding and the number '7' in white, along with all four wheels and the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel, the two rear wheels, and the handle extending straight up.
attribute_handle_type: single bar handle with a hexagonal grip, made of metal with a plastic or rubberized end for comfort
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, two front and two rear, all fixed in parallel pairs
attribute_branding_or_signage: White 'radio flyer' branding and the number '7' on the side panel
